title: Safety, Abuse Resistance, and Guardrails
shortSummary: Study the practical safety surface of shipping AI features to real users and high-stakes environments.
whyItMatters: OpenAI- and Anthropic-style roles increasingly expect engineers to understand misuse, prompt injection, escalation paths, and failure containment. Safety is not a separate department; it is part of the build.
coreConcepts: Prompt injection, jailbreaks, and misuse surfaces
Human escalation for risky outputs or actions
Release checklists for public-facing AI features
Balancing helpfulness, refusal quality, and user trust
